title: Sea Pickle/Bamboo to Money
description: A texture pack that transforms sea pickles and bamboo into banknotes, adding a fun economic twist to the game.
body:
- Replaces **sea pickles** and **bamboo** with **banknotes** for a fun economic touch.  
- **Purely visual**, compatible with **vanilla Minecraft** and most resource packs.  
- Perfect for **SMP servers** or just for fun.  
- **Easy installation**, no mods required.
